upgrades.changelog:
- SDK with fixed dead node issue
- Fixed overcurrent alarm threshold
- Fixed LED system caused soft reset
- Fixed reboot parameter returned to 0 after activation
- Fixed Meter CC on endpoints
- Fixed respond to Import rate type Meter get command
- Fixed Binary Switch Reporting in association with Normally Open / Normally Closed(NO/NC)
- Added Parameter 117 for device rebooting
- Changed Energy reporting to 2 decimal points
- Removed AC main disconnected alarm
- Removed PARs 91, 92, 93, 94
- Removed Indicator for successful inclusion
- other minor improvements
